import os
import pickle
from pathlib import Path

def main():
    ckpt_dir = Path("checkpoints/baseline")
    ckpt_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    model = {
        "type": "heuristic_utility_over_dist",
        "alpha": 2.0,
        "description": "Global heuristic: selects target node maximizing utility / (metric_dist ** alpha + 1) with alpha=2.0 (stronger dist penalty), uses Dijkstra for accurate metric path cost and next-hop. COMPLETE robust predict.py with dijkstra, full eval_config.json + maps_eval handling (or proxy), per-episode try/except, exact JSON contract, per_type (success-only dist).",
        "version": "v5_alpha2.0_dijkstra"
    }
    with open(ckpt_dir / "model.pkl", "wb") as f:
        pickle.dump(model, f)
    print("Saved improved heuristic model to", ckpt_dir)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
